prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第83名持续上升至2025年第69名、2026年第71名，近年排名稳中有升，学校综合实力和认可度提升；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因就业数据（生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%）引发关注；抖音热度总排名第62位（一般），2024年曾达高热（第11位），整体关注度中 等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-，三个学科获A-及以上评级；统计学与理科招生专业（统计学、信息与计算科学）直接关联， 对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与云南大学理科招生中的计算机类、电子信息类、 软件工程等专业高度契合，推高相关专业报考热度；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年全省普通高考总人数约238000人（较2025年大幅增加），虽无分科数据但按历史比例 估算理科考生约16.3万人，竞争显著加剧；云南大学位于云南省（非本省），在新疆招生占比极小（2024年约0.02%），属跨省 招生；云南大学本省（云南）招生占比极高（约60%+），对新疆考生而言属于地域偏好中的\"外省选择\"，无显著地域加成或减分。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10150 名、2026年扩招12%（位次数字增大效应约730名）、新疆考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）、学校软科排名稳步提升（吸引力增强）、工科专业热度高（计算机/电子信息类推高竞 争），预测2026年理科最低位次约10931名，区间10431–11431名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 15901, which significantly advanced to about 10150 in 2025, a shift of about 5751 positions in one year, indicating drastic fluctuations; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10150; the planned enrollment numbers for Science from 2021 to 2025 are (2022: 23, 2023: 24, 2024: 26, 2025: 25), with 25 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, an increase of 3 (+12%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 83rd in 2021 to 69th in 2025 and 71st in 2026, showing a stable upward trend, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2025 is somewhat negative, mainly due to employment data (employment rate of the School of Life Sciences only 4.63%) attracting attention; Douyin popularity ranks 62nd overall (average), with a peak high heat in 2024 (11th), overall attention is moderately high; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-, three disciplines rated A- or above; Statistics is directly related to the Science enrollment majors (Statistics, Information and Computing Science), which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social heat, closely matching the Science enrollment majors at Yunnan University (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Software Engineering, etc.), boosting the application heat for related majors; in 2025, the number of Science examinees in Xinjiang is about 52538, and the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 238000 (a significant increase from 2025), although there is no subject-specific data, estimated by historical proportion, Science examinees are about 163,000, significantly intensifying competition; Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province (not the home province), with a very small enrollment proportion in Xinjiang (about 0.02% in 2024), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Yunnan University's enrollment proportion in its home province (Yunnan) is extremely high (about 60%+), so for Xinjiang examinees, it is an 'out-of-province choice' in terms of regional preference, with no significant regional advantage or disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10150, the 12% enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking number increase effect of about 730), the significant increase in the total number of Xinjiang examinees (intensified competition), the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhanced attractiveness), and the high heat of engineering majors (Computer Science/Electronic Information pushing up competition), the predicted minimum ranking for Science in 2026 is about 10931, with a range of 10431–11431.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10431–11431, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Statistics, Mathematical and Physical Basic Science, etc.) as the main choices; Tier 1 majors (Digital Media Technology, Software Engineering) can be attempted but require rankings better than the lower limit of the range; Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Chemistry, Business Administration, etc.) serve as safety choices. Rankings significantly better than 10431 can focus on attempting Tier 1 computer-related majors.
